name: Honey-Spiced Chicken and Onions
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley or 2 teaspoons dried parsley flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the barbecue grill.
In a small bowl, combine all glaze ingredients and mix well. Sprinkle pepper on both sides of the chicken.
2. When ready to barbecue, place chicken on gas grill over low heat or on charcoal grill 4-6 inches from medium coals. Cook for 5 minutes. Turn the chicken and place onion slices on the grill; brush chicken and onions with glaze. Cook an additional 5-10 minutes, or until onions are tender and chicken is no longer pink and juices run clear, brushing frequently with glaze.
3. Heat any remaining glaze to a boil and serve with chicken.
Broiler Instructions:
1. Spray broiler pan with nonstick cooking spray.
2. Prepare the glaze and chicken as described above.
3. Arrange chicken on spray-coated pan; brush chicken with glaze.
4. Broil 4-6 inches from heat for 5 minutes. Turn chicken and place onion slices on top, brushing chicken and onion slices with glaze. Broil an additional 5-6 minutes or until onions are tender and juices run clear, brushing frequently with glaze.
Nutritional info: Calories per serving: 240; fat, 4 gms.
Dietary exchanges: 3 proteins, 1 fruit, 1 vegetable
Source: Pillsbury Fast and Healthy Magazine, May-June 1994
